claimText: The Government of India has appointed a new chairman along with 7 new members in the National Security Advisory Board (NSAB).
evidenceExcerpt: The Government of India has appointed a new chairman along with 7 new members in the National Security Advisory Board (NSAB).

claimText: - It was first constituted in December 1998, as an advisory body of eminent persons outside the government, including industry, media and civil society, among others.
